reason_of_clustering: These entities represent different contract months for live cattle futures. They are grouped together as they share the same underlying asset (live cattle) but represent different time frames, which allows investors to strategize based on seasonal trends, market conditions, and expectation of price movements over time.

Similar to the live cattle futures, these entities pertain to different contract months for feeder cattle futures. They share the same underlying asset (feeder cattle) and allow investors to make informed decisions based on price trends and market dynamics for feeder cattle specifically.

This cluster includes front month contracts from both live and feeder cattle futures, providing a comparative perspective on short-term market movements. This can help investors understand the relationship between the two cattle categories, assess price differentials, and make better-informed trading decisions.
